generated_comment: Bro ab meetings bhi cycle ke hisaab se plan karni padegi kya 😂 kal koi thoda loud bole toh sab samajh jao, PMS mode on. Chill, joke hai bhai, personal mat lo.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it frames women as irrational and difficult due to menstruation/PMS, dismissing their reactions as hormonally driven. It uses humor and 'just joking' language to normalize attributing women's anger or assertiveness to their period.
original_frame: Workplace: Menstrual and Maternity Leave Bias
persona_text: You are Mohit. Age 23. A fresher at an e-commerce startup in Delhi. You are in your company's unofficial male only WhatsApp group created by colleagues for after-hours chat. Someone just shared a meme making fun of the new period leave policy. You are reacting to the meme and adding your own comment.
